query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A tabletop scene viewed from above containing a dark glass bottle, clear plastic bottles, disposable cups with straws, a round plate with orange residue, plastic bags, and an orange fruit. A red-and-white checkered fabric hangs in the upper background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred tabletop scene with severe motion blur and smeared detail, rendering a dark bottle, plastic bottles, disposable cups with straws, a plate with orange residue, plastic bags, and an orange fruit as streaked, indistinct shapes. The composition carries the casual, unplanned energy of an amateur snapshot, with all surfaces and fine textures dissolved into mushy ambiguity.
